task_completion.description: Create the PortableDrive directory and copy the veracrypt binary into it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands showing 'mkdir -p /home/ga/PortableDrive' and 'cp .../veracrypt /home/ga/PortableDrive/' or an 'ls' output confirming the 'veracrypt' binary is in the target directory.

task_completion.description: Create a 128MB VeraCrypt volume named 'secure_storage.hc' with the specified parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'veracrypt -t -c' command creating 'secure_storage.hc' with size 128M, AES, SHA-512, FAT, and the password 'Tr@vel3r2024!', or an 'ls -lh' showing the file with a size of approximately 128MB.
Terminal commands (like touch, mkdir, echo, or nano) or 'ls' output showing 'mnt', 'mount.sh', 'unmount.sh', and 'README.txt' exist in '/home/ga/PortableDrive'.

task_completion.description: Verify the contents of the scripts and README meet requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible text in the terminal (via echo, cat, or a text editor) showing 'mount.sh' uses './veracrypt' and accepts a password argument (e.g., $1), 'unmount.sh' uses './veracrypt -d', and 'README.txt' contains the phrase 'Portable Encrypted Storage'.

task_completion.description: Mount the volume and copy /etc/os-release and /etc/hostname into it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the volume being mounted to 'mnt' and 'cp /etc/os-release /etc/hostname mnt/' (or similar), followed by an 'ls mnt' confirming the files are inside the mounted volume.

task_completion.description: Ensure the volume is dismounted at the end.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of './unmount.sh' or './veracrypt -d' after the files have been copied, ensuring the volume is no longer mounted.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the veracrypt binary to create the volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual execution of the 'veracrypt' command with creation flags (-c). The agent should not just use 'dd', 'fallocate', or 'touch' to create a fake file named 'secure_storage.hc'.

integrity.description: The agent copied the actual system files into the volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for 'cp /etc/os-release ...' commands. The agent should not just 'touch' or 'echo' fake data into files named 'os-release' and 'hostname' inside the mount point.

integrity.description: The scripts explicitly reference the local veracrypt binary.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the script contents for './veracrypt'. It must use the dot-slash notation to run the portable copy, not the system-wide 'veracrypt' command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Directory: /home/ga/PortableDrive. Required files inside the directory: 'veracrypt' (binary), 'secure_storage.hc' (128MB volume), 'mnt' (directory), 'mount.sh', 'unmount.sh', and 'README.txt'. Volume password: 'Tr@vel3r2024!'. Expected files inside the mounted volume: 'os-release' and 'hostname'.
